notes.state: Nebraska (NE) - rates may vary by state
notes.term_life: Term Life Express (TLE) - express underwriting, no health classes. Available terms: 10, 15, 20, 30-year. Max face amount: $300,000 ($500K not available = null).
notes.iul: IUL Express (IULE) - express underwriting, no health classes. Illustrated rates (not guaranteed). Max face: $300K ages 18-50, $250K ages 51-60, $150K ages 61-75. $500K not available = null.
notes.monthly_zero: A value of 0 indicates the product is available at that face amount but monthly billing is not offered - only annual billing. These apply to high face amounts for older tobacco users in IULE.
notes.living_promise: Final expense product. Ages 45-85. Level: face amounts ,000-0,000. Graded: face amounts ,000-5,000.
